user.title: Connect to Clockwise
user.description: Enter the IP address of your Clockwise LED clock.

error.cannot_connect: Cannot connect to device. Check the IP address and ensure the clock is online.
error.not_clockwise: Device responded but doesn't look like a Clockwise clock.

abort.already_configured: This Clockwise device is already configured.

init.title: Clockwise Settings
init.description: Update connection settings. Poll interval controls how often HA checks for external changes (e.g. via the web UI). Changes made in HA are applied instantly regardless.

error.cannot_connect: Cannot connect to device at new IP address.
error.not_clockwise: Device at new IP doesn't look like a Clockwise clock.
